overview: Banshee (Boss) is a Boss-class Undead monster found in Ruins. 2 grades: Common, Elite. Base stats (Common): 2100 HP, 0 physical damage, 250 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 7 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Fog Attack2 at 220% ratio (0 base damage). behavior tree: BT_Banshee.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 3 melee attacks. Fog Attack1 (140%), Fog Attack2 (220%), Hide Attack (180%).

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 1 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Fog Rush (160%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Corruption
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Corruption icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Decrease Heal
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Decrease Heal icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Silence
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Silence icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Light
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Light (-1000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire, Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500), Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Fog Attack2 (220% ratio)
strategies.description: Fog Attack2 deals 0 damage at base (220% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
